summary: Completed P1/P2 features testing for TrendScout. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified: Homepage Live Demo Card, SEO Pages (trending-tiktok-products, winning-products-2025), Free Tools Page (Profit Calculator, Saturation Checker), Dashboard Daily Opportunities Panel with tabs.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/featured-product returns product with all required fields (id, product_name, category, image_url, launch_score, success_probability, trend_stage, estimated_profit, supplier_source)
Backend: GET /api/public/seo/trending-tiktok-products returns title, description, products array
Backend: GET /api/public/seo/winning-products-2025 returns data with '2025' in title
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/daily-opportunities returns top_opportunity, emerging_products, strong_launches, trend_spikes with auth
Frontend: Homepage (/) shows Live Demo Card with product name, category, trend stage badge, launch score, success prob, est. profit, supplier, Launch button
Frontend: Homepage Live Demo Card fetches data from /api/public/featured-product correctly
Frontend: SEO Page (/trending/trending-tiktok-products) shows 12 products with trend badges and launch scores
Frontend: SEO Page (/trending/winning-products-2025) shows products with title 'Winning Products 2025'
Frontend: Free Tools Page (/tools) shows Profit Calculator (data-testid='profit-calculator')
Frontend: Free Tools Page shows Saturation Checker (data-testid='saturation-checker')
Frontend: Profit Calculator correctly calculates: cost=5, price=25, shipping=2, ad=5 → profit=£13.00, margin=52.0%, ROI=260%
Frontend: Saturation Checker returns results for keyword input with saturation %, competition level, recommendation
Frontend: Dashboard Daily Opportunities Panel (data-testid='daily-opportunities') displays correctly
Frontend: Daily Opportunities shows TOP OPPORTUNITY TODAY section (data-testid='top-opportunity')
Frontend: Daily Opportunities Launch button (data-testid='top-opp-launch-btn') navigates to /launch/:id wizard
Frontend: Daily Opportunities tabs (Emerging, Strong Launch, Trend Spikes) are clickable and functional
Frontend: Daily Opportunities Strong Launch tab shows 'No products in this category' when no products have launch_score >= 65 (expected behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: Saturation Checker uses simulated/random results (not a real API) - documented as expected behavior per spec
seed_data_creation: None - existing test user and products used
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1/P2 features complete. Key endpoints: (1) GET /api/public/featured-product - public, returns top product for homepage demo card. (2) GET /api/public/seo/{slug} - public, supports trending-tiktok-products, trending-dropshipping-products, winning-products-2025, tiktok-viral-products. (3) GET /api/dashboard/daily-opportunities - protected, requires auth, returns top_opportunity, emerging_products, strong_launches (may be empty if no products >= 65 score), trend_spikes. Frontend routes: / (LandingPage with live demo card), /trending/:slug (SeoPage), /tools (FreeToolsPage with Profit Calculator and Saturation Checker), /dashboard (includes DailyOpportunitiesPanel).

seo_pages.trending-tiktok-products: PASS - shows 12 products with TikTok title

saturation_checker.note: Uses simulated results (not real API) - expected behavior

daily_opportunities_panel.top_opportunity: PASS - shows product name, launch score, est. profit, trend stage, Launch button

tabs.emerging: PASS - shows products with Emerging/Exploding trend_stage
tabs.strong_launch: PASS - shows 'No products in this category' (expected when no products >= 65 score)
